chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-1112 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 28-11-2022 Mr. Poonjo Ruplani advocate for applicant. Mr. Abdul Waheed Bijarani A.P.G. Sindh. MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J: - On spy information ‘Bhung’ of 41 kilograms was recovered from applicant by police of Police Station Talhar headed by Sub-Inspector Police Khuda Bux Lund. 2. Learned counsel after arguing the case does not press application and seeks direction to the trial Court to examine the material witnesses as according to him the complainant in this case has already been examined. Learned A.P.G. Sindh has no objection to this proposal. 3. Accordingly, application is dismissed as not pressed; however, the trial Court is directed to examine remaining witnesses within a period of one month where after the applicant would be at liberty to move bail application before the trial Court which however shall be decided on its own merits. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
